meta.intent: Give a forgiving payoff after L24 where a central ice break clearly cascades into rescue progress.
meta.expectedPath: Break the central ice route, use clean low-residue clears around the puppy, and extract before dock pressure becomes sharp.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player can delay the rescue by side-clearing, but the board remains recoverable.
meta.whatItProves: Ice feels satisfying and useful after the first pressured ice decision.
meta.notes: Role: release. The target starts with generous route space by design; the board keeps enough surrounding material to avoid reading as a diagram.
